styleGuide.visualDirection: Cute snake-burrow mobile UI, directly aligned to selected concept style: strong earthy cave scene + clean card grid + one central primary CTA.
mustHave: clear center text safe zone for buttons
simple icon geometry with readable outlines
styleGuide.languageSupportHint: Leave enough flat area for short Chinese labels and medium English labels.

assets.prompt: Create only one clean lobby background plate at 430x932 inspired by selected concepts: earthy cave depth, soft plants, clear upper and middle visual space. No UI controls inside.
assets.negativePrompt: no text, no buttons, no icons, no labels, no watermark, no checkerboard, no foreground characters blocking center
assets.safeAreaHint: Reserve clean top 20% and middle 35% for title and CTA overlays.
assets.readabilityHint: Background should support dark brown title text and yellow CTA.

assets.prompt: Create one filled rounded panel shell based on selected settings concept style: cream center, warm border, subtle depth, no holes.
assets.negativePrompt: no hollow frame, no cutout window, no checkerboard texture, no text
assets.readabilityHint: Panel center must be suitable for body text and row items.

assets.prompt: Create one isolated blank primary button skin matching selected home concept: rounded yellow-orange, clear border, strong center highlight, no text.
assets.negativePrompt: no text, no icons, no mascot, no checkerboard background, no extra objects
assets.safeAreaHint: Center 60% must be flat for button label.
assets.readabilityHint: Designed for high-contrast dark label text.

assets.prompt: Create one isolated feature card background following selected concept: solid rounded rectangle tile, gentle cream fill, subtle shadow, perfectly smooth anti-aliased border, no holes.
assets.negativePrompt: no text, no icon, no cutout circles, no cutout slots, no checkerboard fake transparency, no rough distressed edges, no jagged border
assets.safeAreaHint: Top half for icon, bottom half for short label.

assets.prompt: Create a clean home icon in the same line weight and warm palette as selected concept controls.
assets.negativePrompt: no text, no mascot, no background tile, no checkerboard
assets.safeAreaHint: Centered icon with padding for circular/square button host.

assets.prompt: Create a gear settings icon in warm line style matching selected concepts and existing icon family.
assets.negativePrompt: no text, no extra character, no checkerboard, no heavy detail
assets.readabilityHint: Must remain crisp in feature card icon area.

assets.prompt: Create a simple trophy/rank icon with consistent stroke and warm palette from selected concepts.
assets.negativePrompt: no text, no snake character face, no checkerboard background
assets.readabilityHint: Distinct from settings and check-in icons.

assets.prompt: Create a skins/customization icon in same visual family (palette/swatch style, simple geometry).
assets.negativePrompt: no text, no checkerboard, no cluttered multi-object scene

assets.prompt: Create a check-in icon (calendar + check marker) in warm cartoon line style from selected concepts.
assets.negativePrompt: no text digits, no snake mascot body, no checkerboard
assets.safeAreaHint: Leave edge padding for badge overlay.

assets.prompt: Create an exit icon (door + outward arrow) in same simple warm icon style.
assets.negativePrompt: no warning signs, no text, no checkerboard

assets.prompt: Create a coin icon in warm yellow with simple outline and small highlight, aligned to selected concept style.
assets.negativePrompt: no text, no checkerboard, no realistic glare
assets.readabilityHint: Readable next to numbers in small capsules.

assets.prompt: Create an energy icon (lightning symbol) in warm style consistent with coin icon and selected controls.
assets.negativePrompt: no text, no checkerboard, no realistic electric effects
